The Statue

An heirloom
in the making.

Three feet tall. Fired ceramic. Painted by hand over four weeks of quiet, careful work — and signed by the artist on the base of every piece.

01
Hand-painted
Four-week paint cycle. Twelve layers of warm oil and gold leaf detail.
02
Signed & numbered
Bears the artist's mark and edition number on its underside.
✦
Arrives in luxury packaging
Every statue ships inside a hand-stitched forest green velvet drawstring bag with a gold satin cord and FG monogram — protecting your piece from dust and keeping it safe for storage between seasons. Come next Christmas, simply loosen the cord and your St. Nicholas returns exactly as you left him.
Velvet storage bag
included

Our Story

Two friends.
One Christmas at home.

Joshua flew from London. Kingsley flew from Dubai. They had not stood on Goan sand together since college — and the smell of the place, of pine and woodsmoke and old churches lit for the season, undid them in the same way it always had.

Over a long Christmas Eve in Panaji, they decided to make something only Goa could make: an heirloom statue of St. Nicholas, painted by hand, in a run small enough that every piece could be remembered.

FestiveGiants Co. is the result. We hope one of the twenty-five comes home with you.

Joshua Vas
Founder · London → Goa
Kingsley D'Costa
Founder · Dubai → Goa

Owner · Casa Saudade Restaurante
"I have collected nativity figures for thirty years. This is the first piece in a long time that felt genuinely made by hand. The signing on the base was the moment I knew.
